zh.lifeSummary: William Hare是Alice Wayte的兒子，於1515年出生在英國諾福爾可迪特萊沙拉爾。他於1541年與Alice Sophia Rugge在英國諾福爾可結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1592年9月24日在英國英格蘭諾福爾可貝斯頓享年77歲，埋葬在英國諾福爾可。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: William Hare是Alice Wayte的儿子，于1515年出生在英国諾福爾可迪特萊沙拉爾。他于1541年与Alice Sophia Rugge在英国諾福爾可结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1592年9月24日在英国英格兰諾福爾可貝斯頓享年77岁，埋葬在英国諾福爾可。

nameMeanings.name: Hare
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó hÍr or Ó hÉir ‘descendant of Ír’, a personal name, possibly meaning ‘long-lasting’, borne by a legendary ancestor of the north of Ireland. This name was always monosyllabic.

Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó hAichir ‘descendant of Aichear’, a personal name derived from the epithet aichear ‘fierce, sharp’. The personal name on which this surname is based was originally disyllabic. Although the Anglicized forms O'Hehir and Hehir still exist, particularly in Ireland, pronunciation in later northern Irish has caused Ó hAichir to fall together with another surname, based on a one-syllable personal name, as in sense 1 above.

English: nickname from Middle English hare, harr, here ‘hare’ (Old English hara, sometimes influenced by Old Norse heri). It may have denoted someone who could run fast or was timorous, or who bore some similarity to a hare in appearance, such as bulging eyes.

variants.name: Hehir
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan, Brighid.
Irish (Clare): variant of Hare 2 from Ó hAichir.

variants.name: Hairr
meanings: Irish and English: variant of   Hare   or   Hair  .
Probably also an Americanized form of German   Herr  .

variants.name: Haire
meanings: Irish (northern): variant of   Hare   or   O'Hare  .

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

en.lifeSummary: William Hare was born in 1515, in Tittleshall, Norfolk, England as the son of Alice Wayte. He married Alice Sophia Rugge in 1541, in Norfolk, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. He died on 24 September 1592, in Beeston, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 77, and was buried in Norfolk, England.

fr.lifeSummary: William Hare est né en 1515, à Tittleshall, Norfolk, Angleterre, fils de Alice Wayte. Il a épousé Alice Sophia Rugge en 1541, à Norfolk, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 24 septembre 1592, à Beeston, Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 77 ans, et a été enterré à Norfolk, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: William Hare wurde 1515 in Tittleshall, Norfolk, England, als Sohn von Alice Wayte geboren. Er hat 1541 in Norfolk, England Alice Sophia Rugge geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 24. September 1592 im Alter von 77 Jahren in Beeston, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Norfolk, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: William Hare è nato il nel 1515 nel Tittleshall, Norfolk, England come figlio di Alice Wayte. Lui sposato Alice Sophia Rugge nel 1541, nel Norfolk, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 24 settembre 1592, nel Beeston, Norfolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 77 anni, e fu sepolto a Norfolk, England.

ja.lifeSummary: William Hareは1515年にイギリスノーフォルクティットレシャルでAlice Wayteの息子として生まれた。1541年にイギリスノーフォルクでAlice Sophia Ruggeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1592年9月24日にイギリスイギリスノーフォルクビーストンで77歳で死去し，イギリスノーフォルクにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: William Hare(은)는 1515년 영국 노르폴크 티틀레샤에서 Alice Wayte의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 1541년 영국 노르폴크에서 Alice Sophia Rugge(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1592년 9월 24일 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 브이스턴에서 77세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 노르폴크에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: William Hare nasceu em 1515, em Tittleshall, Norfolk, Inglaterra filho de Alice Wayte. Ele casou-se com Alice Sophia Rugge em 1541, em Norfolk, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 24 de setembro de 1592, em Beeston, Norfolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 77 anos, e foi sepultado em Norfolk, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: William Hare родился в 1515 г. в местности титтлешолл, норфолк, Англия. Его мать звали Alice Wayte. Он женился на женщине по имени Alice Sophia Rugge в 1541 г. в местности норфолк, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер 24 сентября 1592 г. в местности бистон, норфолк, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 77 лет и был похоронен в местности норфолк, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: William Hare nació en 1515, en Tittleshall, Norfolk, Inglaterra como hijo de Alice Wayte. Se casó con Alice Sophia Rugge en 1541, en Norfolk, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 24 de septiembre de 1592, en Beeston, Norfolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 77 años, y fue sepultado en Norfolk, Inglaterra.
